zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese Giffard於1034年4月13日出生在法國瑟-吉馬內隆維爾時，她的父親Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill23歲，母親Ermengarde Flaitel19歲。她和Richard FitzGilbert de Clare至少有7個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於大約1117年在英國素福爾可克萊爾享年84歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾聖 辛茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese Giffard于1034年4月13日出生在法国瑟-吉馬內隆維爾时，她的父亲Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill23岁，母亲Ermengarde Flaitel19岁。她和Richard FitzGilbert de Clare至少有7个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于大约1117年在英国素福爾可克萊爾享年84岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾聖 辛茲。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese Giffard was born on 13 April 1034, in Longueville, Seine-et-Marne, France, her father, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, was 23 and her mother, Ermengarde Flaitel, was 19. She had at least 7 sons and 4 daughters with Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. She died about 1117, in Clare, Suffolk, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese Giffard est née le 13 avril 1034, à Longueville, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde Flaitel, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles avec Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Elle est décédée environ 1117, à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese Giffard am 13. April 1034 in Longueville, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill 23 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde Flaitel 19. Sie hatte mit Richard FitzGilbert de Clare mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1117 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Clare, Suffolk, England und wurde in Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

ht.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese Giffard è nata il il 13 aprile 1034 nel Longueville, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, sua padre, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde Flaitel, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie con Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Morì circa 1117, nel Clare, Suffolk, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese Giffardが1034年4月13日にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンロングエヴィルで生まれた時，父Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevillは23歳，母Ermengarde Flaitelは19歳であった。彼女はRichard FitzGilbert de Clareとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1117年にイギリススフォルククラーで84歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアサイント ネオツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese Giffard(이)가 1034년 4월 13일 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 론구에빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde Flaitel(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Richard FitzGilbert de Clare(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1117년 영국 수폴크 클래르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 세인트 니오츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese Giffard nasceu em 13 de abril de 1034, em Longueville, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde Flaitel, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas com Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1117, em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese Giffard родилась 13 апреля 1034 г. в местности лонгуевилл, сине-ет-марн, Франция, её отцу по имени Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde Flaitel, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери от Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Она умерла около 1117 г. в местности клар, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт неоц, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohese Giffard nació el 13 de abril de 1034, en Longueville, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ermengarde Flaitel, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas con Richard FitzGilbert de Clare. Murió aproximadamente 1117, en Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
